title: Approved employers :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Some work visas require your job to be with an employer who is approved or accredited by Immigration New Zealand, to hire people from overseas.
- Recognised seasonal employers list Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on a Recognised Seasonal Employer Limited Visa.

## Recognised seasonal employers list
Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on a Recognised Seasonal Employer Limited Visa.
- Supplementary Seasonal Employers list Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on a Supplementary Seasonal Employment Work Visa.

## Supplementary Seasonal Employers list
Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on a Supplementary Seasonal Employment Work Visa.
- Accredited employer list Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) or other skilled work visa.

## Accredited employer list
Find employers who are approved to hire workers from overseas on an Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) or other skilled work visa.
